titleStmt.title: SII 38.415: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 415. (A.R. No. 415 of 1912.) MARUDĀḌU, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, maṇḍapa infront of the Purandarēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Achutadēva Mahārāya Date: Vijaya, Tai 1, Sunday śu. 12 Saṅkrama Puṇyakālam = 28th December 1533 A.D.

summary.p: In this inscription letters are engraved in bigger size. It registers a gift of two villages Aṉṟilēri and Vāḍikkuppam to the god of the big temple at Marudāḍu, for the merit of the king's accountant (rāyarkaraṇikam) Piḻaipoṟuttār piḷḷai and also Tiruvēṅgaḍam-uḍaiyār piḷḷai, the son of Vaḍamalaiyār piḷḷai during the authority of Tittaṉ. The accountant of the village Biramarāyaṉ, the ūrārs of Marudāḍu, and an individual, Uttaṇḍan, figure as signatories. At the end record it wishes for the welfare of preceptor (guru vāḻavēṇum).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vicaiya varuṣam taiyi mātam mutal tiyati nāyaṟṟu kiḻamai nāḷ cukkila paṣattu tiruttuvāteciyil ceṅkirama puṇṇiyakālaThe letter ‘la’ is engraved below.ttile
śrī maṉmakāmaṇṭalecuraṉ Accutateva ma(ā*)kārāyar kālattile rāyar karaṇikam piḻaipoṟutt[ā*r] piḷḷaikku puṇṇiyamāka
vaṭamalaiyārpiḷḷai puttiraṉ tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyār piḷḷaikku puṇṇiyamāka Olaieḻuttu tittaṉ Atikārattil marutāṭunayiṉār (peru)
peruntirukkoyil Uṭaiya nayiṉārku Aṉṟileriyum vāṭikkuppamum tāraivāttukuṭuttom yintataṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉa Avarkaḷ
keṅkaikaraiyile kāraāmpacuvai koṉṟa toṣattilum pirāmaṇaṉaiyum koṉṟa toṣattile povaṉ Inta Eḻuttu Ūrkaṇakku pirama
rāyaṉ Eḻuttu Itu marutāṭuūravar Eḻuttu Itum Uttaṇṭaṉ Eḻuttu kuruvāḻaveṇum §
Digital edition of SII 38.415 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
